title: dracontocephalum laciniatum
intro: Dracontocephalum laciniatum, also known as cut-leaved dragon or Chinese dragon flower, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Dracontocephalum laciniatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
